description_long: This is a highly stylized, retro-futuristic unicycle with a robust metal frame and a single large, treaded wheel. The body features a prominent olive-green fuel tank labeled 'Substance', with a cylindrical canister mounted on top and a side compartment marked with a geometric symbol. The front is equipped with a large, round, pastel blue headlight and a purple-tinted windscreen, while the handlebars are wide and fitted with black grips. The seat is a classic black saddle with visible springs for shock absorption, and a brown storage box is attached to the rear. The engine and mechanical components are exposed, giving the vehicle an industrial, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban exploration.
description: A retro-futuristic unicycle with a large treaded wheel, olive-green fuel tank, purple windscreen, and black saddle seat. Features exposed engine parts and a brown rear storage box.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large pastel blue headlight, purple windscreen, and wide handlebars.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'Substance' label on the tank, engine details, and side compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the brown storage box, black saddle, and the back of the wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the geometric symbol on the side compartment and more engine details.
attribute_frame_design: reinforced tubular with exposed engine and side compartments
